title: peristylus atlanticus
intro: Peristylus atlanticus, also known as the Atlantic pogonia, is an orchid species that is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peristylus atlanticus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
